query:
SELECT sl.survey_id, s.customer_name, s.source 
FROM share_links sl 
JOIN surveys s ON s.id = sl.survey_id 
WHERE sl.token = 'vn3b_k7IF6mM8DU4jFMbNhH1Z6zgv9yT';
